query:
DELETE FROM job_resolution r
            USING v2_job_completed c
            JOIN v2_job j ON j.id = c.id
            WHERE r.job_id = c.id
                AND c.id = ANY($1)
                AND c.workspace_id = $2
                AND ($3::TEXT[] IS NULL OR j.tag = ANY($3))
            RETURNING r.job_id
